currency_note: INR prices reflect March 2026 Indian market.

items.name: Decathlon Nabaiji 100 Soft Goggles
items.description: India's most affordable branded swim goggle. Great starter option.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: New swimmers or casual users seeking an affordable, comfortable goggle for recreational swimming in pools or calm open water.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Competitive swimmers or those needing advanced hydrodynamics, a secure fit, and superior optics for intense training.

items.name: Nivia Marine Swimming Goggles
items.description: Budget Indian brand goggles. Decent anti-fog and comfortable fit.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Beginners or casual swimmers seeking affordable, comfortable goggles for basic training and recreational use.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Competitive swimmers needing high-performance, low-drag goggles for races.

items.name: Cosco Aqua Dash Swimming Goggles
items.description: Affordable Indian-brand goggles for recreational swimming.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Beginners and casual swimmers seeking an affordable, comfortable option for recreational use.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Competitive swimmers or those needing high-performance, low-drag goggles for races.

items.name: Speedo Biofuse 2.0
items.description: Comfortable Speedo training goggles. Flexible seal for long sessions.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Swimmers prioritizing comfort and a secure fit for regular training, fitness, and recreational swimming.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Competitive swimmers requiring ultra-low profile, minimal drag race goggles for elite performance.
standout_qualities: Clear, wide field of vision with UV protection
Reliable anti-fog performance for extended use

items.name: Arena Cobra Ultra Swipe
items.description: Premium racing goggles with Swipe anti-fog. Low drag hydrodynamic design.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Intermediate competitive swimmers seeking minimal drag and clear vision for races and intense training.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Casual swimmers prioritizing maximum comfort for leisurely laps or beginners learning basic strokes.

items.name: Speedo Fastskin Hyper Elite
items.description: Top-tier racing goggles. Ultra-low profile for maximum hydrodynamics.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Advanced swimmers and competitive racers seeking maximum speed and minimal drag in competition.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Casual swimmers or beginners looking for comfortable, everyday training goggles.
common_complaints: Specific fit may not suit all face shapes.
Less comfortable for prolonged training sessions.
standout_qualities: Secure and stable fit during high-speed swimming.

items.name: Decathlon Nabaiji 100 Plus Swimsuit
items.description: Budget Decathlon swimsuit. Chlorine resistant polyester for pool use.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Beginner swimmers and casual users seeking a durable, comfortable, and affordable swimsuit for regular pool training.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Competitive swimmers requiring advanced hydrodynamic designs for race performance.
standout_qualities: Excellent chlorine resistance for frequent pool use

items.name: Decathlon Nabaiji 100 Jammer (Men)
items.description: Affordable men's jammer. Durable polyester for daily pool use.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Beginner swimmers seeking an affordable, durable jammer for regular pool training and fitness.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Competitive swimmers needing maximum hydrodynamic efficiency and advanced performance features.

items.name: Speedo Essential Endurance+ Jammer
items.description: Speedo's durable training jammer. Endurance+ fabric lasts 20x longer.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Intermediate swimmers focused on regular training, lap swimming, and exceptional durability in chlorinated pools.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Casual beachgoers or elite racers needing a FINA-approved technical suit for competition.
standout_qualities: Durable fabric designed for frequent use

items.name: Arena Team Stripe Swimsuit (Women)
items.description: Durable training suit from Arena. MaxLife fabric for extended use.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Intermediate swimmers needing a highly durable, chlorine-resistant suit for frequent pool training sessions.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Casual beachgoers prioritizing fashion and a relaxed fit over performance and longevity.
standout_qualities: Exceptional chlorine resistance for extended use
Long-lasting fabric designed for frequent training

items.name: Speedo Fastskin LZR Pure Intent Jammer
items.description: Top-tier FINA approved racing jammer. Maximum compression and hydrodynamics.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Elite competitive swimmers seeking maximum hydrodynamic advantage and FINA approval for race day.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Casual swimmers, beginners, or those needing a durable swimsuit for daily training sessions.

items.name: Arena Powerskin Carbon Air2 (Women)
items.description: Elite racing suit with carbon fiber cage. Maximum compression for competition.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Elite swimmers needing FINA-approved maximum compression and hydrodynamic efficiency for competitive racing and peak performance.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Recreational swimmers, beginners, or those seeking a comfortable, chlorine-resistant suit for regular training.
common_complaints: Uncomfortable for extended wear or non-racing use

items.name: Decathlon Nabaiji Silicone Swim Cap
items.description: Budget silicone swim cap. Durable and easy to put on.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Beginner swimmers seeking a durable, easy-to-wear, and budget-friendly cap for recreational swimming or lessons.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Competitive swimmers or athletes prioritizing hydrodynamic performance and minimal drag for races.

items.name: Nivia Classic Swim Cap
items.description: Affordable Indian brand silicone cap. Good for regular pool use.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Beginners and recreational swimmers seeking an affordable, durable silicone cap for regular pool sessions.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Elite or competitive swimmers requiring advanced hydrodynamic designs for peak race performance.

items.name: Speedo Plain Moulded Silicone Cap
items.description: Speedo's popular silicone cap. 3D moulded for comfortable fit.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Swimmers seeking a comfortable, durable, and hydrodynamic cap for regular training, club competitions, and general fitness.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Elite competitive swimmers seeking the absolute fastest, most specialized race cap for top-tier tournaments.
common_complaints: Can pull hair if not applied carefully.
May feel tight on very large heads.
standout_qualities: Excellent comfort and fit due to 3D moulding.
High durability and longevity of silicone material.
Reliable performance from a trusted brand.

items.name: Arena Moulded Pro II Silicone Cap
items.description: Premium racing cap. Dome shape reduces drag in competition.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Intermediate to advanced swimmers prioritizing speed and hydrodynamic efficiency in competitive races and intense training sessions.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Beginner swimmers or those seeking a loose, comfortable cap for casual swimming or water aerobics.
standout_qualities: Excellent drag reduction due to dome shape

items.name: Speedo Fastskin Racing Cap
items.description: Elite racing cap. Wrinkle-free fit for minimum drag.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Competitive swimmers and triathletes prioritizing maximum speed and hydrodynamic efficiency in races and intense training.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Recreational swimmers or beginners seeking a comfortable, easy-to-wear cap for casual pool sessions.

items.name: Decathlon Nabaiji Short Fins
items.description: Affordable short fins for kick drills. Builds leg strength without changing technique.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Beginner swimmers focusing on kick technique and leg strength in pool training sessions.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Advanced swimmers seeking maximum propulsion for speed training or racing.
standout_qualities: Aids in developing proper kick technique

items.name: Speedo Biofuse Training Fins
items.description: Comfortable Speedo training fins. Biofuse technology for natural feel.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Beginner swimmers and those improving kick technique, focusing on leg strength and ankle flexibility in pool training.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Advanced swimmers needing maximum propulsion for sprint training or open water distance swimming.
standout_qualities: Excellent comfort and natural feel during use.

items.name: Arena Powerfin Pro
items.description: Premium training fins. Angled blade for efficient kick training.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Intermediate swimmers aiming to enhance kick power, speed, and technique during pool training sessions.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Novice swimmers seeking basic buoyancy assistance or open water swimmers needing maximum propulsion.
standout_qualities: Angled blade for efficient kick training

items.name: FINIS Zoomers Gold Fins
items.description: Natural rubber fins for serious training. Great for building kick tempo.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Intermediate swimmers focusing on improving kick tempo, technique, and leg strength during structured pool training.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Beginners needing maximum propulsion or casual swimmers seeking relaxed, effortless swimming.
standout_qualities: Excellent for developing kick tempo and technique

items.name: TYR Crossblade Training Fins
items.description: Advanced training fins with cross-blade design for varied resistance.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Advanced swimmers refining kick technique, increasing tempo, and building specific leg strength for competitive swimming.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Beginner swimmers needing basic propulsion or casual users seeking relaxed recreational swimming.
standout_qualities: Multi-density silicone for comfort and durability

items.name: Decathlon Nabaiji Pull Buoy
items.description: Affordable pull buoy for arm stroke drills. Good buoyancy for beginners.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Beginner swimmers focusing on isolating arm strength and refining stroke technique during training sessions.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Advanced competitive swimmers needing varied resistance or full-body training, or those seeking speed-focused equipment.
standout_qualities: Provides stable buoyancy for technique focus

items.name: Speedo Elite Pull Buoy
items.description: Speedo branded pull buoy. Ergonomic shape for comfortable use.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Intermediate swimmers aiming to isolate upper body, build strength, and refine stroke technique during pool training sessions.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: New swimmers still learning basic strokes or those seeking a general flotation aid for recreational water play.
standout_qualities: High buoyancy for effective leg isolation

items.name: Arena Pull Kick Pro
items.description: Dual-purpose pull buoy and kickboard. Versatile training aid.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Intermediate swimmers refining stroke technique, body position, and building strength in both upper and lower body during training.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Swimmers seeking a competitive edge solely through race-day equipment or those not focused on technique drills.
standout_qualities: Dual-purpose design for upper and lower body training
Provides high buoyancy for effective drills

items.name: FINIS Axis Buoy
items.description: Advanced pull buoy with aligned buoyancy. Forces proper body rotation.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Advanced swimmers refining body rotation, improving stroke mechanics, and isolating upper body strength during focused training sessions.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Beginner swimmers needing maximum buoyancy or those seeking a simple flotation device for casual pool use.
standout_qualities: Aligned buoyancy for optimal body position

items.name: TYR Pull Float
items.description: Durable TYR pull float. High-density foam for consistent buoyancy.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Advanced swimmers refining upper body technique, building strength, and improving stroke efficiency during pool training.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Beginner swimmers needing full body coordination practice or open water enthusiasts.
